Bash(cd C:/Users/straz/faro-app && python -c "
with open\('.env.local', 'rb'\) as f:
    raw = f.read\(\)
content = raw.decode\('utf-16'\).strip\(\)
with open\('.env.local', 'w', encoding='utf-8', newline='\\n'\) as f:
    f.write\(content + '\\n'\)
print\('OK'\)
")

Bash(ANON="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImxhaG5uZ3d5ZmJlamdlc3VsYWZyIiwicm9sZSI6ImFub24iLCJpYXQiOjE3NzMwMzI0MzUsImV4cCI6MjA4ODYwODQzNX0.V_aP5XgKIGCywmbGFVN5dG_7ZBSKFBaXsY56q8I9GxQ"
LOC="e5931742-8249-4d0d-a028-7f1d65b10857"
URL="https://lahnngwyfbejgesulafr.supabase.co/rest/v1/rpc"

for fn in get_ventas_semana get_ventas_semanales get_ventas_mensuales get_financial_results; do
  echo "=== $fn ==="
  curl -s -X POST "$URL/$fn" \\
    -H "apikey: $ANON" \\
    -H "Authorization: Bearer $ANON" \\
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \\
    -d "{\\"p_location_id\\": \\"$LOC\\"}"
  echo ""
done)
